# Oraxen Documentation

Oraxen is a Minecraft plugin for creating custom items, blocks, glyphs, furniture, sounds, and other resource-pack content.

Documentation pages are available as raw MDX for agents and other tools. Append `.mdx` to a page URL, removing any trailing slash first.

Example:
- Page: https://oraxen.mizius.com/configuration/items/data/properties
- Raw MDX: https://oraxen.mizius.com/configuration/items/data/properties.mdx
